mapper.select: SELECT id, section_id, sentence_text, ipa, sample_audio_storage_key, created_at FROM speaking_library_sentences WHERE section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, section_id, sentence_text, ipa, sample_audio_storage_key, created_at FROM speaking_library_sentences WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_library_sentences (section_id, sentence_text, ipa, sample_audio_storage_key) VALUES (#{sectionId}, #{sentenceText}, #{ipa}, #{sampleAudioStorageKey})
